video_details.title: The Bollinger Band Edge Most Traders Never Discover
video_details.description:
Bollinger bands are one of my favorite trading indicators to use for trading. This video won’t just explain how to read Bollinger Bands, but it will also cover how to use Bollinger Bands support and resistance. I used them on Wall St as a full-time trader, and now I’m sharing how you can use them as part of your own trading strategies.  

✅ Join my trading course ➡️: https://theonelanceb.com/

🐂 All free content is sponsored by Clear Street, my broker of choice! https://tinyurl.com/ClearSt-Lance
---------------------------------------------
📱Follow my socials:

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/theonelanceb

Reacting to Kristjan Qullamaggie's Moving Average Strategy: https://youtu.be/H01JbbEY7ac
How to Use Fibonacci: https://youtu.be/FHo1qxHRG98
---------------------------------------------
Chapters:
00:00 How to Use Bollinger Bands
00:27 What Are Bollinger Bands
01:03 The Pendulum Concept
02:06 Measuring Overextension
02:59 Measuring Volatility Contraction
03:50 Bollinger Band Trading Examples
05:49 Bollinger Bands to Gauge Overextension
07:14 When Bollinger Bands are Contracting


If you’re new to my channel, my name is Lance Breitstein. I spent over a decade trading equities at Trillium, setting the record for highest PNL in a single year as their Top Trader. I trained dozens of traders to become successes while managing Trillium’s Chicago office. With over $100m in verified profits, I now spend my time focused on turning good traders into greats and greats into GOATs. Advisor to SMB Capital and mentor of 7- and 8-figure PER YEAR traders. I am to be profiled in the next edition of Jack Schwager’s Market Wizards.

The journey is never easy. Trading is one of the most difficult, but most rewarding jobs imaginable. I am here to help you on your path, wherever that leads you.

May you want it bad enough to overcome any obstacles.
-(The One) Lance B
